title: vendor: bump containers/image and containers/image
body:
Update containers/image and containers/storage to the current master
revisions.

So to inherit all the fixes in the ostree backend.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: hm.. the CI is still running
@runcom Can you restart the tests again, please? (Is it something I can do as well?)

> Is it something I can do as well?)

I go to Travis and just click Cancel build, then Rebuild
